title: ononis antiquorum var. pungens
intro: Ononis antiquorum var. pungens, also known as the Spiny Restharrow, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being astringent and anti-inflammatory. The health benefits of the Spiny Restharrow include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, as well as its use as a topical treatment for wounds and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to have various health-promoting effects.
